title: Tomato Chickpea Skillet
instructions: Warm olive oil in a skillet over medium heat.
Cook onion and garlic until soft.
Add tomatoes, cumin, salt, and pepper.
Stir in chickpeas and simmer for 10 minutes.
Serve warm with bread, rice, or greens.

title: Paneer Vegetable Rice Bowl
instructions: Heat oil in a pan over medium heat.
Sear paneer cubes until lightly golden.
Add bell pepper and carrot and cook for 4 minutes.
Season with garam masala and salt.
Serve the paneer vegetables over warm rice.

title: Lemon Garlic Chicken Salad
instructions: Season chicken with garlic, salt, and pepper.
Cook chicken in a pan until fully cooked.
Rest the chicken for 5 minutes, then slice it.
Toss lettuce, cucumber, tomato, lemon juice, and olive oil.
Top the salad with sliced chicken.

title: Vegan Coconut Lentil Soup
instructions: Cook onion, carrot, and garlic in a pot until softened.
Add curry powder and stir for 30 seconds.
Add lentils and vegetable stock.
Simmer until lentils are tender.
Stir in coconut milk and season with salt.
